{
  "claims": [
    "AB 460 aims to strengthen the State Water Resources Control Board's management of water use in response to drought emergencies.",
    "Increasing demands for water are expected in California without sufficient resources to sustain them.",
    "Illegal water diversion can lead to limited access to water in the future.",
    "The severity of droughts in California is increasing.",
    "The Water Board requires enhanced tools to manage and protect water supplies during times of scarcity.",
    "Granting interim relief authority to the Water Board is considered a necessary tool for addressing water management.")
  ]
}
